audit_items.proof_trace: GetPixelWriteMask is a static inline function declared to return Quantum — a scalar numeric type (float, unsigned short, or unsigned int depending on build flags), not a pointer. A NULL check is semantically inapplicable to a scalar return value. Every caller across all files (composite.c, paint.c, fx.c, etc.) correctly uses the return value in a scalar threshold comparison (`<= (QuantumRange/2)`), never as a pointer dereference; the property's assertion premise is factually incorrect.
